name: formal_multi_question_email

source.selected_text: Hi Maya, can you confirm whether the Q3 launch brief is approved? Also, please send the revised pricing table by Friday and let me know who owns the customer note.

raw_model_output:
Sure, here are three replies:
1. Hi Maya, I can confirm the Q3 launch brief is approved. I will send the revised pricing table by Friday and confirm who owns the customer note.
---
2. Hi Maya, the Q3 launch brief is approved. I will get the revised pricing table to you by Friday and follow up with the owner for the customer note.
---
3. Hi Maya, I can confirm approval for the Q3 launch brief, send the revised pricing table by Friday, and clarify who owns the customer note.
expected_parsed: Hi Maya, I can confirm the Q3 launch brief is approved. I will send the revised pricing table by Friday and confirm who owns the customer note.
Hi Maya, the Q3 launch brief is approved. I will get the revised pricing table to you by Friday and follow up with the owner for the customer note.
Hi Maya, I can confirm approval for the Q3 launch brief, send the revised pricing table by Friday, and clarify who owns the customer note.
